---
title: "CV"
toc: false
sidebar: false
---

::: {.page-intro}
Assistant professor in statistics at **ENSAI** (Rennes). Below is a short academic CV — see
[Research](research.qmd) for publications and [Software](coding/coding.qmd) for code.
:::

## Appointments

```{=html}
<div class="cv">
  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-entry__date">Sep 2024 – Present</div>
    <div class="cv-entry__body">
      <span class="cv-entry__role">Assistant Professor in Statistics</span>
      <span class="cv-entry__org">ENSAI, Rennes</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-entry__date">2024</div>
    <div class="cv-entry__body">
      <span class="cv-entry__role">Postdoctoral Researcher</span>
      <span class="cv-entry__org">ENS de Lyon</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-entry__date">2020 – 2023</div>
    <div class="cv-entry__body">
      <span class="cv-entry__role">PhD in Statistics</span>
      <span class="cv-entry__org">Université de Montpellier &amp; INRAE</span>
      <div class="cv-entry__desc">Ranking problems and high-dimensional change-point detection (interrupted Apr–Oct 2022 by an industry internship at QRT).</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Research Experience

```{=html}
<div class="cv">
  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-entry__date">2019</div>
    <div class="cv-entry__body">
      <span class="cv-entry__role">Research project</span>
      <span class="cv-entry__org">ENS Paris-Saclay, with Vianney Perchet</span>
      <div class="cv-entry__desc">Optimal order selection for an online reward-maximization problem.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-entry__date">2019</div>
    <div class="cv-entry__body">
      <span class="cv-entry__role">Research visit</span>
      <span class="cv-entry__org">OVGU Magdeburg, with Alexandra Carpentier</span>
      <div class="cv-entry__desc">Signal detection and change-point detection.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-entry__date">2018</div>
    <div class="cv-entry__body">
      <span class="cv-entry__role">Research internship</span>
      <span class="cv-entry__org">University of Cambridge</span>
      <div class="cv-entry__desc">The Gaussian Free Field.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Industry Experience

```{=html}
<div class="cv">
  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-entry__date">Apr – Oct 2022</div>
    <div class="cv-entry__body">
      <span class="cv-entry__role">Quantitative Researcher (Intern)</span>
      <span class="cv-entry__org">QRT — Qube Research &amp; Technologies</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Education

```{=html}
<div class="cv">
  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-entry__date">2016 – 2020</div>
    <div class="cv-entry__body">
      <span class="cv-entry__role">École Normale Supérieure de Lyon</span>
      <span class="cv-entry__org">Mathematics (normalien)</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-entry__date">2013 – 2016</div>
    <div class="cv-entry__body">
      <span class="cv-entry__role">CPGE MPSI / MP*</span>
      <span class="cv-entry__org">Preparatory school, Strasbourg</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Teaching

```{=html}
<div class="cv">
  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-entry__date">2024 – Present</div>
    <div class="cv-entry__body">
      <span class="cv-entry__role">Lecturer</span>
      <span class="cv-entry__org">ENSAI, Rennes</span>
      <div class="cv-entry__desc">Hypothesis Testing, Linear &amp; Generalized Linear Models, Parallel Computing (<a href="teaching/teaching.html">course pages</a>).</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-entry__date">2020 – 2022</div>
    <div class="cv-entry__body">
      <span class="cv-entry__role">Teaching Assistant</span>
      <span class="cv-entry__org">Université de Montpellier</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Service

```{=html}
<div class="cv">
  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-entry__date">Reviewing</div>
    <div class="cv-entry__body">
      <span class="cv-entry__role">Reviewer / sub-reviewer</span>
      <div class="cv-entry__desc">Annals of Statistics, Bernoulli, EJS</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Skills &amp; Languages

```{=html}
<div class="cv">
  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-entry__date">Programming</div>
    <div class="cv-entry__body">
      <span class="cv-entry__org">Julia, Python, R; GPU programming (CUDA / KernelAbstractions.jl)</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-entry">
    <div class="cv-entry__date">Languages</div>
    <div class="cv-entry__body">
      <span class="cv-entry__org">French (native), English (fluent)</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
